title: Interior Designer
description:
Interior Designer

About Us

SCDA is an international practice integrating Architecture, Interiors and Landscape to create holistic spatial experiences. With offices in Singapore, Shanghai, Manila and New York City, SCDA has projects in over 80 locations across Asia, Africa, Europe, Oceania, and North America. In parallel, SCDA Lab pioneers social and cultural initiatives, applying research and design to enact measurable change and advance the environmental cause.

The Opportunity

We are seeking a design-driven Senior Interior Designer to join our Singapore studio. This role is for a strong designer with proven experience delivering residential and hospitality interior projects from concept design through schematic design and design development. You will work closely with senior designers to shape refined interior environments, contributing to SCDA’s design vision across high-profile international projects.

This is a hands-on design role, suited to someone deeply engaged in design thinking, spatial quality, and material expression.

Key Contributions

  • Develop and carry interior design projects from concept design through schematic design and design development.
  • Contribute to the design of completed residential and hospitality projects, maintaining design intent and quality throughout all stages.
  • Lead and refine space planning, material palettes, detailing, and FF&E design.
  • Produce clear, well-crafted drawings, 3D studies, and presentation materials using SketchUp, AutoCAD, and Adobe Creative Suite.
  • Participate in internal design reviews and design presentations, articulating design ideas with clarity.
  • Collaborate closely with architectural and design teams to ensure cohesive and well-resolved interior outcomes.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s Degree or higher in Interior Design, Interior Architecture, or Architecture.
  • Minimum 5 years of professional experience, with a portfolio demonstrating completed residential and hospitality interior projects.
  • Proven experience delivering projects from concept through schematic design and design development.
  • Strong design sensibility with a refined eye for spatial composition, proportion, materiality, and detailing.
  • Proficiency in AutoCAD, SketchUp, and Adobe Creative Suite; familiarity with Revit is an advantage.
  • Strong visual communication skills and the ability to articulate design ideas clearly.
  • Design-focused, self-motivated, and comfortable working in a collaborative studio environment.

Why Join Us

At SCDA, design excellence sits at the heart of our practice. You will join a collaborative, design-led studio with exposure to international residential and hospitality projects, and the opportunity to further develop your design voice within a globally recognised practice.

Application

Interested candidates are invited to submit a CV and portfolio as a single PDF, clearly demonstrating design development across all stages and completed residential or hospitality projects, to careers@scdaarchitects.com. Please include current and expected salary, as well as notice period.

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
SCDA is a design studio seamlessly integrating architecture, interiors, landscape and product design to create holistic spatial experiences. Established in 1995 by Founding Principal and Design Director Soo Chan, SCDA was the recipient of three American Institue of Architects (AIA) International (2018) and AIA NY Awards for Architecture (2019); inaugural Royal Institute of British Architects (RIBA) Award for International Excellence (2016); the RIBA International Award for OneKL (2012) and the Lincoln Modern (2003); and the SIA-Getz Architecture Prize for Emergent Architecture in Asia (2006), in addition to nine Chicago Athenaeum International Architecture Awards.

SCDA’s work strives for tranquility and calmness qualified by space, light and structural order. Architectural expressions are distilled, to capture the spiritual essence of ‘place’; while architecture and interior are inspired by the cultural and climatic nuances of context;  integrating landscape, water features and blurring the boundary between inside and out. Spaces are characterized by lush gardens, water courts and air wells, effecting a sensuous engagement with the elements. A sensitivity to the inherent beauty of natural materials is expressed through clarity in construction details, and elemental architectural expression.
postedCompany.name: SCDA INTERIORS PTE. LTD.
